pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release flag to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiled bytecode remains compatible with Java 17, which may cause runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used or if strict version enforcement is required.
